creator: florian.ziesche+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #6)
> Is this PR still relevant?

Yes, it is. This is still the only proper way of getting full OpenCL support on FreeBSD. (freeocl is lacking a lot of functionality and we don't even have to talk about support from Nvidia/Intel/AMD ...)

Also, the last patch from ohartman that was attached here https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=171914 seems to have been lost in the migration? This was for pocl 0.8 and it worked pretty well. I'm wondering why this was never added to ports?
